userStories.title: Add notification persistence schema
userStories.description: Create notifications table and read-state storage so read/unread persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Notifications table exists with read flag

userStories.title: Backend: notification read-state updates
userStories.description: APIs to mark read/unread and to fetch notifications with read state.

userStories.title: Unread badge and count
userStories.description: Show unread badge count in header and update in real-time as read state changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Notification list UI
userStories.description: List notifications with content, timestamp, and read state; clicking opens notification.
acceptanceCriteria: List shows notifications ordered by time
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Read/unread toggle and mark all read
userStories.description: Allow toggling individual read state and clearing all read notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear all read removes or archives read notifications

userStories.title: Filter notifications by read state
acceptanceCriteria: Filter UI works and preserves selection
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
